headline: Einhorn prioritizes capital preservation, warns of downside risks
summary: Investing.com -- Greenlight Capital's David Einhorn said he is focusing on capital protection as markets rally on geopolitical optimism, warning that investors may be underestimating potential downside risks.

raw.headline: Einhorn prioritizes capital preservation, warns of downside risks
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Greenlight Capital's David Einhorn said he is focusing on capital protection as markets rally on geopolitical optimism, warning that investors may be underestimating potential downside risks.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Colgate-Palmolive, Lowers Price Target to $79
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $88 to $79.

raw.headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Colgate-Palmolive, Lowers Price Target to $79
raw.summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $88 to $79.

headline: IMF cuts global growth outlook on Iran war energy disruptions
summary: Investing.com -- The International Monetary Fund reduced its growth forecast on Tuesday, citing energy price increases and supply disruptions stemming from the Iran war, and cautioned that the global economy could approach recession if the conflict intensifies and oil prices remain above $100 per barrel through 2027.

raw.headline: IMF cuts global growth outlook on Iran war energy disruptions
raw.summary: Investing.com -- The International Monetary Fund reduced its growth forecast on Tuesday, citing energy price increases and supply disruptions stemming from the Iran war, and cautioned that the global economy could approach recession if the conflict intensifies and oil prices remain above $100 per barrel through 2027.

headline: Griffin warns of global recession if Hormuz Strait stays closed
summary: Investing.com -- Citadel CEO Ken Griffin warned Tuesday that a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could push the world into recession within six to 12 months.

raw.headline: Griffin warns of global recession if Hormuz Strait stays closed
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Citadel CEO Ken Griffin warned Tuesday that a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could push the world into recession within six to 12 months.

headline: Procter & Gamble's Beauty Strength vs. Baby Care Weakness: What's Next?
summary: PG's Beauty unit shines with 4% growth from premium innovation, while Baby Care lags due to inventory headwinds, with improvement eyed in the second half.

raw.headline: Procter & Gamble's Beauty Strength vs. Baby Care Weakness: What's Next?
raw.summary: PG's Beauty unit shines with 4% growth from premium innovation, while Baby Care lags due to inventory headwinds, with improvement eyed in the second half.

headline: Fed’s Goolsbee says rate cuts may be delayed until 2027 amid oil prices
summary: Investing.com -- Chicago Federal Reserve President Austan Goolsbee said on Tuesday that interest-rate cuts may need to wait until 2027, depending on how long oil prices remain elevated.

raw.headline: Fed’s Goolsbee says rate cuts may be delayed until 2027 amid oil prices
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Chicago Federal Reserve President Austan Goolsbee said on Tuesday that interest-rate cuts may need to wait until 2027, depending on how long oil prices remain elevated.

headline: Bessent says Fed should wait on rate cuts amid oil spike
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Monday the Federal Reserve should wait before lowering interest rates as oil prices surge above $100 a barrel due to the ongoing war in Iran.

raw.headline: Bessent says Fed should wait on rate cuts amid oil spike
raw.summary: Investing.com -- U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Monday the Federal Reserve should wait before lowering interest rates as oil prices surge above $100 a barrel due to the ongoing war in Iran.

headline: Stocks rally despite Hormuz risks as Barclays weighs durability of gains
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays told clients in a note on Tuesday that the unusual post-ceasefire market backdrop, where equities continue to climb even as oil rises, may prove difficult to sustain, warning that investors are “trading a flimsy equilibrium.”

raw.headline: Stocks rally despite Hormuz risks as Barclays weighs durability of gains
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Barclays told clients in a note on Tuesday that the unusual post-ceasefire market backdrop, where equities continue to climb even as oil rises, may prove difficult to sustain, warning that investors are “trading a flimsy equilibrium.”

headline: Citi upgrades U.S. equities as geopolitical uncertainty drives defensive shift
summary: Investing.com -- Citi revealed in a note on Tuesday that it has upgraded U.S. equities to overweight from neutral, pairing the move with an existing overweight on the U.K. while cutting emerging markets to neutral.

raw.headline: Citi upgrades U.S. equities as geopolitical uncertainty drives defensive shift
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Citi revealed in a note on Tuesday that it has upgraded U.S. equities to overweight from neutral, pairing the move with an existing overweight on the U.K. while cutting emerging markets to neutral.

headline: BP forecasts "exceptional" first quarter, expects a net debt jump
summary: Investing.com -- BP said Tuesday that its oil trading division is on track for an "exceptional" first quarter, driven by the surge in oil prices following the U.S.-Israeli military campaign against Iran.

raw.headline: BP forecasts "exceptional" first quarter, expects a net debt jump
raw.summary: Investing.com -- BP said Tuesday that its oil trading division is on track for an "exceptional" first quarter, driven by the surge in oil prices following the U.S.-Israeli military campaign against Iran.
